title: Dogs Camp Iligan
description: Dogs Camp Iligan is a Non-Profit Organization aims to help and provide aid to stray animals.

title: PART- Iligan (PET ADOPTION and RESCUE TEAM- Iligan), Inc.
description: A SEC Registered, Non- Profit Organization, based in Iligan City. It's rescue team was founded and created in December 2017.

title: Iligan Stray Feeder
description: Iligan Stray Feeders is a community of animal lovers dedicated to caring for homeless and free-ranging dogs and cats in Iligan by providing food, compassion, and support for their welfare. Beyond feeding, the group works together to promote adoption, spay/neuter programs, and other initiatives that help give strays a healthier and brighter future. 🐶🐱❤️
